description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a padded, curved headband connecting two circular ear cups. The headband appears to be covered in a textured, leather-like material, providing comfort and durability. The ear cups are cushioned and encased in a smooth, dark material, likely synthetic leather or foam, designed to fit snugly over the ears. The outer shells of the ear cups are made of a matte-finished plastic or metal, giving the headphones a modern and robust appearance. Hinges or adjustable sliders connect the ear cups to the headband, allowing for size adjustment and a secure fit. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for personal audio use in urban environments.
description: A sleek pair of over-ear headphones with a padded headband and cushioned ear cups, finished in dark materials and a modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arch of the padded headband and both ear cups facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headband and the profile of a single ear cup.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headband and the outer sides of both ear cups.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other ear cup's profile and the headband's curvature.
